title: That one ought to make confession while he is in the flesh.

source.title: ANF05. Fathers of the Third Century: Hippolytus, Cyprian, Caius, Novatian, Appendix

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That one ought to make confession while he is in the flesh.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: In the fifth Psalm: “But in the grave who will confess unto Thee?”

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: Also in the twenty-ninth Psalm: “Shall the dust make confession to Thee?”

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: Also elsewhere that confession is to be made: “I would rather have the repentance of the sinner than his death.”

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: Also in Jeremiah: “Thus saith the Lord, Shall not he that falleth arise? or shall not he that is turned away be converted?”
